name: SAL.Gen_Bounded_Definite_Vectors_Sorted

documentation.description:
As a special exception under Section 7 of GPL version 3, you are granted
additional permissions described in the GCC Runtime Library Exception,
version 3.1, as published by the Free Software Foundation.

simple_types.name: Vector
simple_types.code:
type Vector is private with
  Default_Initial_Condition => Last_Index (Vector) = No_Index;

subprograms.name: Element
subprograms.code: function Element (Container : in Vector; Index : in Peek_Type) return Element_Type

subprograms.name: First_Index
subprograms.code: function First_Index (Container : in Vector) return Peek_Type

subprograms.name: Insert

documentation.description:
Insert New_Item in sorted position. Items are sorted in increasing
order according to Element_Compare. New_Item is inserted after
Equal items, unless Ignore_If_Equal is true, in which case
New_Item is not inserted.

subprograms.name: Is_Full
subprograms.code: function Is_Full (Container : in Vector) return Boolean

subprograms.name: Is_Sorted
subprograms.code: function Is_Sorted (Container : in Vector) return Boolean

documentation.returns: See comment on similar Is_Sorted below

subprograms.name: Last_Index
subprograms.code: function Last_Index (Container : in Vector) return Base_Peek_Type

subprograms.name: Length
subprograms.code: function Length (Container : in Vector) return Ada.Containers.Count_Type

formals.name: Element_Compare
formals.code: function Element_Compare (Left, Right : in Element_Type) return Compare_Result
